project_description: Improve our accounting workflow and train our staff using QuickBooks

organization.name: CareER Association
organization.description: Standing for 'Care in Education and Recruitment', CareER is a non-profit organisation established in 2014 in Hong Kong by a University graduate with disability with a mission to advance employment for people with disability in tertiary education. CareER is the first charity in Hong Kong to provide targeted career and peer support to tertiary-educated individuals with any type of disabilities and special educational needs (SEN), including physical impairment (visual, hearing, mobility), developmental and learning disability (Autism, ADHD, specific learning difficulties), mental illness, chronic illness and more. In addition to providing free job-matching services for corporations and beneficiaries in the past decade, CareER created a local talent market for PWD with our CareER member and employer systems to tackle workplace disability inclusion systematically, creating an environment where everyone may realise and showcase their true potential to become independent, contributing members of society.

what_we_need: Join us via Zoom call (date and time to be discussed) to learn more about our needs and the existing workflow
Advise and improve our current usage and accounting workflow using QuickBooks
Volunteer with knowledge and experience in QuickBooks is required
project_details.background: We are looking for a volunteer to help us train our team to best utilize our QuickBooks account.
project_details.what_we_have: Volunteer will have a 45-mins briefing to understand our team's needs, and learn how they may use their QuickBooks accounting skills to enhance our existing workflow.
project_details.why_important: This will ensure our accounts are organized and easily accessible by different project teams, allowing us to fulfil different charity project needs.

special_program.name: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program
special_program.description: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program aims to encourage skilled volunteers to support Swire Trust NGO partners in education, marine conservation, and arts.
